title: Senior Fleet Manager at Grofers Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Grofers Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Grofers Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Grofers Logistics:
Grofers Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
